content: The orthographic and linguistic ambiguity of the term 'reflexion' (a variant spelling of 'reflection' common in educational vocabulary curricula) can be leveraged to build a more robust LLM self-reflection mechanism that incorporates human pedagogical definitions of reflection as structured critical review of past work. This hybrid mechanism frames agent self-reflection not just as an AI internal debugging step, but as a deliberate learning exercise analogous to the guided writing reflection taught in high school English curricula.
